title: Dataset Record
description: An experimental or simulation dataset for battery research

title.description: Name or title of the dataset

description.description: Brief description of the dataset contents

url.description: URL to download or access the dataset

format.description: File format(s), e.g. CSV, HDF5, JSON

license.description: Licence under which the dataset is published

size.description: Approximate size of the dataset, e.g. 2.3 GB

body.description: Optional additional markdown content for the record page
